title: filix-mas patens var. invisa
intro: Filix-mas patens var. invisa, also known as the Autumn fern or Invasive Lady fern, is a type of non-native, invasive fern species that has been introduced to various regions of the world, including North America. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Filix-mas patens var. invisa include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help to reduce pain and inflammation, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve cardiovascular health. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, where it is combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects and provide relief from various health conditions.
